title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 235-8786 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Donations are accepted according to the "What We Accept" list located on the agency website. The agency will inspect for quality and ask that all items be free of stains, tears, and pet hairs. For business pickup, fill out the online form. FEES: None for donation drop-offs, $50 for donation pickup DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Fairview, Gresham, Troutdale, Portland, and Wood Village SITE HOURS: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Mattress Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM
